title: Update session name and Discord nickname

log.context: Update session name and Discord nickname

The script redirects the curl output to `/dev/null`, so there's no visible curl output to check. Here's what happened:

**Session name: "The Second Clungus C"**

The script counted the `.jsonl` session files in `/home/clungus/.claude/projects/-mnt-data/`, subtracted the succession offset of 177, and converted the result to a Roman numeral. "C" is 100, meaning this is the 100th session since the succession event (session 277 overall).

The session name was written to `/tmp/clungus-session-name.tx...(truncated)
